VAL-CONT-001.evidence: 22 PNG-related unit tests pass covering: png_decode_all_filter_types (None/Sub/Up/Average/Paeth), png_decode_rgb_4x4_pixel_values and png_decode_rgba_4x4_pixel_values (pixel-level verification), png_decode_test_image_from_file (real PNG from share/), png_header_parses_rgb/rgba, png_decode_to_surface_correct_colors. Full inflate decompression, scanline unfiltering, and BGRA pixel conversion verified.

VAL-CONT-002.evidence: Screenshot in image viewer mode shows 128x128 PNG test image (colorful gradient with circle) centered in content area. Image is recognizable, correctly colored (proper RGB mapping), correctly oriented (not flipped/rotated), not corrupted. Image is contained within content area boundaries — chrome (title bar, status bar) frames it without overlap.

VAL-CONT-003.evidence: Full demo flow verified: typed 'hello world\ntext editor' (23 chars) → pressed F1 → image viewer showed PNG → pressed F1 → editor showed identical text with cursor at same position (end of 'text editor'), status bar showed '23 chars' (unchanged). F1 key does not conflict with editing keys. Code confirms cursor_pos and doc_content are preserved across switches.

VAL-CONT-004.evidence: Unit tests confirm error handling: png_decode_invalid_magic_returns_err, png_decode_empty_data_returns_err, png_decode_buffer_too_small_returns_err, png_empty_data_returns_err, png_invalid_magic_returns_err, png_truncated_before_signature_returns_err, png_truncated_idat_returns_err, png_truncated_ihdr_returns_err, png_unsupported_bit_depth_returns_err, png_unsupported_color_type_returns_err, png_zero_height_returns_err, png_zero_width_returns_err. All return Err, none panic.

VAL-CROSS-001.evidence: Full demo flow screenshots: (1) boot — empty editor with '0 chars', (2) typed 'hello world\ntext editor' — text renders with proper antialiasing, (3) F1 → image viewer — PNG displays centered with chrome, (4) F1 → back to editor — text preserved exactly ('23 chars'), cursor at correct position. 5 distinct screenshots taken across the flow.

VAL-CROSS-006.evidence: Image viewer screenshot shows all three elements simultaneously: title bar ('Document OS' branding), status bar ('Image viewer | 128x128 px' + clock '00:01:00'), and PNG image in content area. Image viewer uses same UI shell as editor — chrome is not replaced.
